_comment: Remote backed Zarr demo. Run: `guanaco -c examples/configs/cloud_zarr_config.json`. With backed_mode=true the dataset is opened with anndata.experimental.read_lazy from its consolidated metadata: obs/var/obsm load into memory while the expression matrix stays on the remote store and is fetched one gene-column at a time as you view genes (the cloud-native form of 'backed' access). This store's X is CSR (slow per-gene reads), but it ships a gene-major CSC copy as layers['X_csc']; expression_layer points GUANACO at it so per-gene reads are far faster. Omit expression_layer to auto-use a CSC layer when X is CSR. Works on local and remote s3://, gs://, https:// .zarr stores.

BALF_COVID.description: Public COVID-19 bronchoalveolar lavage (BALF) atlas, 275,056 cells x 24,740 genes, served remote-backed from Google Cloud Storage via read_lazy. X (CSR) stays on the cloud; gene columns are read from the gene-major layers['X_csc'] on demand.

title: GUANACO cloud-backed demo
